title: ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS - 211info
text: HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY ALLIANCE FOR COMMUNITY WELLNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations and individual counseling services, specializing in providing culturally sensitive services to LGBTQ2+ and HIV-positive communities. 647 W Luellen Drive Suite 3 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Focus is on serving LGBTQ2+ and HIV-positive communities Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 342-5088 162 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-5088 ext 162 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 9am-5pm Services: Individual Counseling * AIDS/HIV Issues Individual Counseling * LGBTQ2+ Issues Mental Health Evaluation * AIDS/HIV Issues Mental Health Evaluation * LGBTQ2+ Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - HIV AND HEPATITIS C TESTING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - NEEDLE EXCHANGE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HIV+ CARE COORDINATION SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY
